descriptionInUI: MOOSE CSAR runtime for the Combat SAR flight task. When a pilot ejects, a downed-pilot is spawned with a radio beacon and the CH-47 flights tasked Combat SAR can fly in, hover/land, and recover them. Delivering a downed pilot to a friendly field spares that aviator in the campaign (the airframe is still lost). C-130 flights tasked Combat SAR fly the HC-130 'King' overhead orbit, light an air-tracking TACAN beacon every rescue helo homes on, and carry a 'LARS' F10 button that lists every active survivor (position, bearing/range from the King) to relay. Inert unless at least one blue Combat SAR flight is in the mission (the mission generator emits dcsRetribution.CombatSAR only then). Blue-side. By default only HUMAN ejections count and rescue is player-flown; turning on the 'Automatic Combat SAR' campaign setting also lets AI rescue helos be commandeered for a standing alert (and makes AI ejections rescuable).

specificOptions.nameInUI: Auto-smoke the downed pilot when a rescue helo is near
Pickup distance for boarding the downed pilot (m)
Rescue-hover height the helo must hold to pick up (m)
Enemy capture race: the enemy may try to seize a downed pilot before rescue
Capture race: chance (%) an ejected pilot draws an enemy snatch party
Capture race: how far from the survivor the snatch party appears (m)
Capture race: how close the party must reach the survivor to seize them (m)
Capture race: seconds the party must hold on the survivor to capture them
Capture race: number of infantry in the enemy snatch party
